context: Tests whether the agent makes Horizon tier cards fully clickable the Horizon-native way. Horizon 'group' blocks have a built-in 'link' setting — populating it makes the entire card a single clickable link with no CSS overlay/stretched-link hack required (the Dawn-era '.multicolumn-card ::before' technique is obsolete on Horizon). The agent should set 'link' on each tier-card group block and add a CSS hover affordance so the clickable card reads as interactive.

checklist.name: assets/custom.css created
checklist.description: A file named assets/custom.css exists in the output

checklist.name: Tier card group blocks have link set
checklist.description: Each of the 3 tier-card 'group' blocks in templates/index.json has a non-empty 'link' setting pointing to its product URL (/products/taster, /products/enthusiast, /products/cellar)

checklist.name: Native group link used (no CSS overlay hack)
checklist.description: The agent makes the card clickable via the group block's native 'link' setting — it does NOT rely on a Dawn-era CSS stretched-link hack (a ::before pseudo-element with inset:0 over a '.multicolumn-card'), which is unnecessary and incorrect on Horizon

checklist.name: CSS hover affordance present
checklist.description: assets/custom.css contains a :hover rule on the tier card that provides a visual affordance (e.g., cursor: pointer, transform/translate lift, box-shadow, or border change) so visitors recognize the whole card is clickable

checklist.name: Subscribe button retained on each card
checklist.description: Each of the 3 tier cards still contains a 'button' block with a 'Subscribe to [tier]' label and a link to the matching product page

checklist.name: Full homepage structure
checklist.description: templates/index.json contains all expected parts of the Horizon homepage: a 'hero' section, two 'custom-liquid' anchors, and 'section' containers for how-it-works, tiers, recent drops, testimonials, FAQ (with an 'accordion' block), and email capture (with an 'email-signup' block)

checklist.name: Valid JSON
checklist.description: templates/index.json is valid JSON that can be parsed without errors
